description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoe. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which will not burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear. Product Details Round toed camel coloured shoe with five-hole lace-ups and stitch details at the seams of the toe box Padded inner Upper adhered to the outsole Thick TPU outsole with an upraised heel and multidirectional lugs Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
